description_long: This object is a straight-bladed sword with a pointed tip and a symmetrical, double-edged blade. The blade is metallic and tapers evenly to a sharp point, suitable for thrusting and slashing. The crossguard is simple and straight, providing basic hand protection, and the handle is cylindrical, extending downward with a subtle taper and no visible wrapping or ornamentation. The entire object appears to be a uniform dark gray, suggesting a steel or iron construction. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative features on the blade, guard, or handle. The sword is functional in appearance, with a utilitarian design and no accompanying sheath.
description: A straight, double-edged sword with a pointed tip, simple crossguard, and plain cylindrical handle, all in dark gray metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the double-edged blade, straight crossguard, and cylindrical handle.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the blade's width, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle.
attribute_handle_design: straight cylindrical metal handle, no visible wrapping or decoration
